system.powerDescription:
You implant a false memory into a group of humans up to CAT size. This memory cannot majorly contradict past memories the creature would hold. The memory must hold similar content for all affected creatures, such as a memory of meeting you for the first time or getting scolded by their bosses. 

If this memory would be particularly outlandish, roll PSYCHE, only spending a burst on success. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may modify the parameters of a roll while active.
